note: Recorded claims; excerpts omitted, evidence spans retained for deterministic rescoring.

predictions.title: Upload size limit
predictions.content: The maximum upload size is 50 MiB.

predictions.title: Upload rate limit
predictions.content: The configured upload rate limit is 10 requests per 60-second window.

predictions.title: Allowed upload types
predictions.content: Only PDF and PNG filename extensions are allowed for uploads.

predictions.title: Authentication requirement
predictions.content: Upload authorization requires the user to be authenticated.

predictions.title: Uploader role requirement
predictions.content: Upload authorization requires the user to have the uploader role.

predictions.title: Per-user rate limiting
predictions.content: Upload rate limiting is keyed by the user's ID.

predictions.title: Rate-limit response
predictions.content: Rate-limited uploads return HTTP 429 with a retry interval of 60 seconds.

predictions.title: Extension validation
predictions.content: Upload extension checks are case-insensitive and use the final suffix of the filename.

predictions.title: Unsupported type response
predictions.content: An unsupported upload extension returns HTTP 415.

predictions.title: Size boundary
predictions.content: Upload size validation rejects files only when their size is strictly greater than the configured maximum.

predictions.title: Oversize response
predictions.content: An oversized upload returns HTTP 413 and reports the configured maximum byte count.

predictions.title: Upload ownership
predictions.content: Successfully stored uploads are associated with the uploading user's ID as owner.

predictions.title: Upload success response
predictions.content: A successful upload returns HTTP 201 with the stored file identifier in the id field.

predictions.title: Oversize persistence guard
predictions.content: Oversized uploads must not be persisted.
